TOP SECRET//SI/TK//FGI GBR/RD//RELIDO

(U) MARQUE DECISION-TRACING DEMO FIXTURE

(U) This document is a synthetic intelligence assessment shaped to exercise
the full marking-decision cascade Marque tracks. Every portion below is a
real CAPCO marking that triggers a specific rule, constraint, page rewrite,
default-fill, or banner-rollup decision. Section dividers describe what each
group is designed to exercise; the banner above and the banner at the end of
the document are intentionally inconsistent with the projected roll-up so
banner-rollup rules detect the mismatch.

(U) ==== SECTION A: NOFORN-IMPLIES CASCADES =====================================

(U) Each portion below is bare-classified with a caveated token but omits
explicit NOFORN. The closure-stage diff catches "caveated but missing
NOFORN" and proposes the fix; downstream PageRewrites then strip REL TO,
the FD&R family, and DISPLAY ONLY tokens that NOFORN supersedes.

(S//SI) Imagery interpretation of facility complex BLACKSITE-3 indicates
continued construction activity along the southern perimeter.

(S//SI-G) Compartmented imagery sub-system reporting on the same site.

(S//TK) Telemetry intercepts from launch corridor confirm propellant type.

(S//HCS) HUMINT product corroborating telemetry analysis.

(S//SAR-BLACKLIGHT) SAR-program activity report (program identifier
synthetic).

(S//RD) Yield estimates derived from operational testing programs.

(S//RD/ATOMAL) Yield estimates shared under bilateral NATO sharing
arrangements; AEA axis routes ATOMAL alongside RD.

(S//FGI GBR) Liaison reporting from a partner service.

(S//FGI DEU) Second-partner liaison reporting on the same activity.

(S//IMCON) Imagery method-of-collection protection.

(S//ORCON) Originator-controlled assessment summary.

(C//UCNI) Unclassified Controlled Nuclear Information at adjacent
safeguards facility. In classified context this triggers a five-step
rewrite chain: promote NOFORN -> evict UCNI -> clear REL TO -> clear FDR
family -> clear DISPLAY ONLY.

(U) ==== SECTION B: REL TO SUPERSESSION CASCADES ================================

(U) Portions that explicitly carry REL TO alongside caveated tokens. The
caveated default-fill promotes NOFORN; the noforn-clears-rel-to PageRewrite
then drops REL TO from the same portion.

(S//REL TO USA, GBR) Standalone REL TO portion, no caveat - should NOT
trigger the supersession chain.

(S//REL TO USA, GBR/SI) REL TO commingled with SCI - SCI is caveated and
implies RELIDO; the cascade fires here.

(S//SI/REL TO USA, GBR) Same content, tokens in opposite order - confirms
order-independence at the lattice layer.

(S//DSEN) Display-statement special enabled marking - caveated.

(S//DISPLAY ONLY TO USA, GBR/IMCON) DISPLAY ONLY commingled with IMCON;
IMCON triggers caveated NOFORN; NOFORN-clears-display-only fires.

(U) ==== SECTION C: RELIDO UNANIMITY AT BANNER ROLLUP ===========================

(U) Banner-level RELIDO should appear only if every classified portion in
the document carries RELIDO. The first five portions carry it; portion C-6
intentionally omits RELIDO; banner roll-up should drop RELIDO from the
projected banner.

(S//RELIDO) Section-C portion one with RELIDO.
(S//RELIDO) Section-C portion two with RELIDO.
(S//RELIDO) Section-C portion three with RELIDO.
(S//RELIDO) Section-C portion four with RELIDO.
(S//RELIDO) Section-C portion five with RELIDO.

(S) Section-C portion six - classified, no RELIDO. Unanimity broken; banner
must not carry RELIDO across the document.

(U) ==== SECTION D: MULTI-SYSTEM COMMINGLING =====================================

(U) NATO classification, ATOMAL on the AEA axis, pure FGI, and JOINT
markings each route through distinct grammar surfaces. The recanonicalize
rules normalize legacy compound forms; the FGI/NATO transmute rule moves
NATO into FGI position when commingled with US classification.

(S//FGI NATO) NATO-origin material commingled with US classification -
transmutes to FGI NATO position at portion level.

(S//CTS//ATOMAL) NATO Cosmic Top Secret plus ATOMAL on AEA axis. ATOMAL
routes via AEA, not as a NATO classification suffix.

(S//CTS) Pure NATO Cosmic Top Secret portion (uncommingled NATO context).

(JOINT TS USA GBR CAN) Three-party joint product; three constraint
evaluations fire on the classification axis alone (joint-requires-rel-to-
coverage, non-us-requires-dissem, joint-requires-usa).

(U) ==== SECTION E: CLOSING ASSESSMENT ============================================

(U) The combinatorial structure above (~30 portions across 8 category
axes evaluated by ~18 registered rules each) represents on the order of
several thousand machine-equivalent marking decisions, of which several
hundred are substantive enough that a human classifier would re-evaluate
them when any single token in any single portion changed. Marque records
the full causal graph deterministically in microseconds and emits it
through the DecisionSink instrumentation surface; this fixture is the
canonical input for that machinery.

TOP SECRET//SI/TK//FGI GBR/RD//RELIDO
